attributes.name: [Azure Application Gateway OTel] Gateway latency under 1s 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: This SLO tracks gateway-boundary latency for Azure Application Gateway via OTel access logs. A request is counted as good when the total time the gateway took to process the request and return a response to the client (attributes.azure.agw.latency) is below 1 second. The objective is that at least 99.5% of requests are served within 1 second over a rolling 30-day window. Sustained breaches indicate gateway overhead growth (TLS, WAF evaluation, capacity pressure) or backend slowness surfaced at the gateway boundary.
